noTypeHierarchyAvailable: No type hierarchy available for selection
headerSourceNotFound: Did not find a corresponding file.
incDirNotExist: Add include path failed, directory '{0}' doesn't exist
configChangeRestart: {0} already changed ,do you want to restart clangd server ?
clangdVersionCheck: Clangd version '{0}' is detected. It is recommended that clangd version 12 or higher
clangd.headerInsertion: Controls how clangd inserts missing #include directives.
clangd.headerInsertion.iwyu: Always include the canonical header, even if it's already transitively included
conflictMessage: You have both the Microsoft C++ (cpptools) extension and kylin clangd extension enabled. The Microsoft IntelliSense features conflict with clangd's code completion, diagnostics etc.
clangdNotFoundMessage: Clangd binary not found on your PATH, extension will not work properly.
updateAvailable:
An updated clangd language server is available.
Would you like to upgrade to clangd {0} from {1}
clangdLSNotFound:
The '{0}' language server was not found on your PATH.
Would you like to download and install clangd {1} ?
clangdBinaryNotFound:
The clangd binary '{0}' was not found.
Would you like to download and install clangd {1} ?
clangdPath: The path to clangd executable, e.g.: /usr/bin/clangd.
clangdArgs: Additional command line arguments to pass to clangd.
clangdTraceFile: Names a file that clangd should log a performance trace to, in chrome trace-viewer JSON format.
fallbackFlags: Extra clang flags used to parse files when no compilation database is found.
serverCompletionRanking: Always rank completion items on the server as you type. This produces more accurate results at the cost of higher latency than client-side filtering.
restartAfterCrash: Auto restart clangd (up to 4 times) if it crashes.
checkUpdates: Check for language server updates on startup.
conflictMessageDesc: Warn about conflicting extensions and suggest disabling them.
inactiveRegions.useBackgroundHighlight: Use a background highlight rather than opacity to identify inactive preprocessor regions.
inactiveRegions.opacity: Opacity of inactive regions (used only if clangd.inactiveRegions.useBackgroundHighlight=false)
enableCodeCompletion: Enable code completion provided by the language server
enableHover: Enable hovers provided by the language server
addAdditionalIncludePaths: Code completion: Add header include paths.
addAdditionalIncludePathsDeprecated: This setting is deprecated, please add header include paths in the .clangd file.
createClangdConfigFile: Create clangd configuration file in workspace folder
clangdDetails: .clangd file is used to configure clangd and requires clangd version 11 or later.
compileFlags: Extra clang flags used to parse files, one flag per line. For example: you can use '-I/path/to/include' to add an include path.
clangFormatDetails: .clang-format file is used to configure clangd's code formatting style
clangTidyDetails: .clang-tidy file is used to configure clang-tidy diagnostics
compileDatabaseChanged: Clangd compile database file at {0} has been changed
extSettingChanged: The setting option '{0}' has been changed
clangdConfigFileChanged: The clangd configuration file '{0}' has been changed
restartToTakeEffect:
It will take effect after restarting.
Do you want to restart clangd ?
onConfigChangedDesc: What to do when configuration changes (e.g., clangd configuration file changes, compile database file changes, extension settings changes, etc.) require restarting the clangd language server
onConfigChangedDesc.prompt: Prompt the user for restarting the server
useScriptAsExecutable: Allows the path to be a script e.g.: clangd.sh.
useBuiltInClangdIfAvailable: Use built-in clangd server if available (currently only available for linux-x64 and linux-arm64), otherwise use the clangd binary specified in clangd.path.
